messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

Jenkins Debian Package Builder Plugin 1.6.11 and earlier implements functionality that allows agents to invoke command-line `git` at an attacker-specified path on the controller, allowing attackers able to control agent processes to invoke arbitrary OS commands on the controller.

Jenkins Debian Package Builder Plugin versions 1.6.11 and earlier contain a vulnerability wherein agents can execute the command-line `git` from a path specified by an attacker on the controller. This allows attackers with control over agent processes to run arbitrary operating system commands on the controller.
